title: International Flavors & Fragrances: A Bad Smell
text: International Flavors & Fragrances has been struggling since its acquisition of a big chunk of the DuPont business, with growth coming to a standstill and costs rising rapidly. The company has divested some businesses to tackle its high leverage, but sales and earnings have consistently missed targets, and quite frankly have come down. Shares of IFF have fallen further after a disappointing earnings report, raising concerns about the company's high debt and dividend.

title: 3 Sorry Retail Stocks to Sell in August Before It's Too Late
text: Retail is a dynamic world, and the winds of change are ever-present. The sector has historically been a barometer of economic health and consumer confidence.

title: IFF to Webcast Fireside Chat at Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Sept. 7
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IFF--IFF (NYSE: IFF) today announced that Chief Executive Officer Frank Clyburn will participate in a fireside chat at the Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Thursday, Sept. 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Investors may access the live webcast on the Company's website at ir.iff.com. For those unable to listen to the live webcast, a recorded version will be made available for replay. title: International Flavors (IFF) Announces Creative Center Completion
text: International Flavors (IFF) opens a facility in New Century to expand its innovation footprint.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Misses on Q2 Earnings, Lowers View
text: International Flavors' (IFF) Q2 earnings and sales fall year over year on lower volumes. The company lowers its sales guidance for 2023, anticipating a slow recovery in volumes.

title: S&P Gains and Losses Today: Bank Stocks Tumble on Moody's Downgrade
text: The S&P 500 dipped 0.4% on Tuesday, Aug. 8, 2023, as bank stocks lost ground after Moody's downgrades.

title: Markets Plunge at Midday After Bank Downgrades
text: U.S. equities sank at midday on Tuesday, Aug. 8, 2023, following bank downgrades by Moody's and data showing credit card debt rose to a record.

title: International Flavors Stock Is the Worst Performer in the S&P 500. Here's Why.
text: The stock fell Tuesday after the scent and flavor maker cut its full-year sales outlook.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for International Flavors (IFF) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Misses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: International Flavors (IFF) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.86 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.10 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.54 per share a year ago.

title: IFF stock plunges 20% as inventory costs fuel big miss, sales outlook cut
text: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. shares fell off a cliff in the extended session Monday after the company said higher inventory costs nearly doubled, and cut its sales forecast for the year.

title: IFF Announces Dr. Casper Vroemen to Succeed Dr. Gregory Yep as Chief R&D and Sustainability Officer
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IFF (NYSE: IFF) today announces that Dr. Gregory Yep, Chief R&D and Sustainability Officer, has resigned effective Sept. 1 to pursue a new opportunity in his professional journey. Yep will be succeeded by Dr. Casper Vroemen—Vice President of R&D, Health & Biosciences—who has dedicated his career to the advancement and commercialization of leading-edge biotechnology. title: IFF Completes Divestiture of Flavor Specialty Ingredients Business
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IFF (NYSE:IFF) today announced that it successfully completed the previously announced divestiture of its Flavor Specialty Ingredients (FSI) business to Exponent, a leading UK-based private equity firm, on August 1, 2023. “The sale of our FSI business unit is another step in our journey to continuously maximize value,” said Frank Clyburn, IFF CEO. “Portfolio optimization is a central part of our ongoing strategy to improve growth and returns.
